title: New ClawHub skill: youtube-content - Download YouTube transcripts and generate summaries, threads
content:
Download YouTube transcripts and generate summaries, threads, and blog posts from video content. Zero external API dependencies.

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: clawhub.ai/skills/skills/youtube-content

Part of the Hermes autonomous product stack (31 agent-native tools, all CI-tested).
Sponsor if useful: GitHub Sponsors / Buy Me a Coffee.
